zh.lifeSummary: 當Catrin Salusbury於大約1470年出生在威爾士丹比爾亨藍時，她的父親Thomas Salisbury28歲，母親Janet Griffith1歲。她和Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1551年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Salusbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Salisbury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

nameMeanings.name: Catrin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catrin Salusbury was born about 1470, in Henllan, Denbighshire, Wales, her father, Thomas Salisbury, was 28 and her mother, Janet Griffith, was 1. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn. She died in 1551, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn. Elle est décédée en 1551, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Catrin Salusburyが約1470年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアヘンランで生まれた時，父Thomas Salisburyは28歳，母Janet Griffithは1歳であった。彼女はLord Richard ap Howel of Mostynとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1551年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catrin Salusbury(이)가 대략 1470년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 헨런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Salisbury(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Griffith(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1551년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catrin Salusbury родилась около 1470 г. в местности хенллан, денбаишир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Thomas Salisbury было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Griffith, 1. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Lord Richard ap Howel of Mostyn. Она умерла в 1551 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
